prompt: A single highly detailed fine art portrait of a young Slavic woman in traditional Eastern European folk costume, shown from the chest up in a graceful three-quarter profile with a calm, melancholic expression. She has pale freckled skin, soft green-blue eyes, defined cheekbones, naturally full lips, and loose wavy chestnut-brown hair with delicate flyaway strands. Her head is crowned with an extravagant oversized wreath of wildflowers, dried flowers, wheat, thistles, leaves, and flowing embroidered ribbons in warm autumn tones of burnt orange, crimson, ochre, ivory, and muted gold. She wears an authentic embroidered white linen blouse with intricate red floral cross-stitch patterns, layered rustic vest, woven fabrics, traditional beads, antique medals, leather straps, and handcrafted folk accessories. Painterly oil-on-canvas aesthetic with expressive visible brushstrokes, textured impasto, watercolor splashes, ink splatter edges, and mixed-media illustration style. Soft diffused natural lighting, warm earthy color palette, museum-quality realism, elegant composition, minimal clean white background with artistic paint splashes fading into negative space, ultra-detailed fabric textures, botanical details, cinematic fine art portrait, masterpiece, highly detailed, 8K, award-winning illustration, no text, no watermark, no logo.

promptZh: 一幅高度细腻的艺术肖像，主体为一位 年轻的斯拉夫女性，身着传统的东欧民间服饰，半身像，优雅的四分之三侧面，表情平静而忧郁。她拥有白皙且带有雀斑的皮肤、柔和的蓝绿色眼睛、轮廓分明的颧骨、自然丰满的双唇，以及松散波浪状的 栗棕色 头发，带有细碎的发丝。她的头上戴着一个 由野花、干花、麦穗、蓟花、叶片和飘逸的刺绣丝带组成的夸张大型花环，色调为温暖的秋季色彩，包括焦橙色、深红色、赭石色、象牙白和柔和的金色。她穿着一件正宗的白色亚麻刺绣衬衫，带有复杂的红色花卉十字绣图案，叠穿质朴的背心，搭配编织面料、传统珠饰、古董奖章、皮带和手工制作的民间配饰。油画画布美学，具有表现力的可见笔触、纹理厚涂、水彩飞溅、墨迹边缘和混合媒介插画风格。柔和的漫射自然光，温暖的大地色调，博物馆级写实感，优雅的构图，极简的纯白背景，带有艺术性的颜料飞溅并逐渐淡入负空间，超细腻的面料纹理，植物细节，电影级艺术肖像，杰作，高度细腻，8K，获奖插画，无文字，无水印，无标志。
